name_en: In stock! YSL Saint Laurent has released a bestseller 👉 The chain bag is already on fire in the fashion world. This old French luxury brand has an extraordinary magic, and the look is full of highlights 💫! Imported original cowhide 🐂, Italian custom-engraved logo hardware 🔱, every detail is authentic with ZP standards! A favorite of celebrities, high appearance value aside, it is also a powerhouse 👌 Dimensions: 20×17×6cm, Model 1888
